data.Description (en): Acala is an Ethereum-compatible smart contract platform optimized for DeFi and powered by the ACA token. It offers a suite of financial primitives, including a trustless staking derivative (Liquid DOT), a multi-collateralized stablecoin backed by cross-chain assets (aUSD), and an AMM DEX – enabling developers to access DeFi building blocks and compose DeFi applications.
data.Description (zh): Acala 是针对 DeFi 优化的以太坊兼容智能合约平台，由 ACA 代币驱动。它提供一套金融原语，包括无需信任的质押衍生品（Liquid DOT）、由跨链资产支持的多抵押稳定币（aUSD）和 AMM DEX，使开发者能够访问 DeFi 构建模块并组合 DeFi 应用程序。
